'''Lou''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]] militia as of the time of the [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|Battle of Haruun Kal]]. When [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] arrived at [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], he was stationed at the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], where he worked as a customs broker. There he confronted Master Windu, who eventually broke his nose. Later, Lou would cooperate with the Jedi Master.

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
